wsProjectName.message: Add optional full name for this group...

wsOpenTabsDesc.message: You can close, reorder, and name your open tabs here.

wsArchiveSubtitle.message: Previously closed tabs from this workspace.

quickLabelsDesc.message: Drag and drop labels over your tabs to rename them

panelNotesDesc.message: Jot down general rules, goals, or free-text notes for this group.

panelTasksDesc.message: Organize your tasks within this group.

panelHistoryDesc.message: Track your recent actions and revert accidental changes.

backupDesc.message:
Auto-save is running in background.
Last saved: just now

stateDesc.message: Use this to revert recent accidental drops or edits.

confirmCloseGroup.message: Close all tabs in this group?

confirmRestore.message:
WARNING! This will replace your data with the backup.
Continue?

confirmClearArchive.message: Are you sure you want to clear the archive? All previously closed tabs in this group will be deleted permanently.

infoExport.message: Saves your groups to a file.

infoImport.message: Loads groups from a file (you can choose to merge or overwrite).

infoRescue.message: Reverts to the last background auto-save.

confirmImportMerge.message:
Do you want to REPLACE your entire database with this file?

• Click 'OK' to completely OVERWRITE your data.
• Click 'Cancel' to safely ADD (merge) these projects to your existing list.

errStorageQuota.message: 💾 Saving error! Storage might be full. Please export a backup and delete old projects.

tooltipDedupeLogic.message: Smart logic for closing duplicated tabs. If several identical tabs are in a group, only the leftmost one remains. If tabs are open both inside and outside groups, tabs in groups have priority.

tooltipCryoInfo.message: Your frozen tab groups are stored here. Closing unused tabs speeds up your browser and frees up computer memory. You can unfreeze a group at any time to resume your work exactly where you left off by clicking the restore button on the right.

wsFrozenToastText.message: ❄️ This group is frozen. All tabs are safely stored but currently closed to save computer memory. To unfreeze this group and continue working, please open the Groups Freezer extension (Popup) and click the Unfreeze icon.

wsWelcomeText.message: This is your group's control panel! This page will always be the first tab in the group. Here you can sort and manage tabs, restore them from the archive, rename, and search. You can also keep project-specific notes and tasks, undo accidental actions, and create backups. Enjoy your productive work!

globalSettingsWarning.message: Warning: These settings manage the backups for ALL your projects, not just the current group.
